custom_css: .header__menu-item span { font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; color: var(--rt-ink); }
.header__inline-menu .header__submenu { background: var(--rt-paper); border: 1px solid var(--rt-ink); padding: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(44, 37, 32, 0.1); min-width: 200px; }
.header__submenu .header__menu-item { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rt-ink); transition: all 0.2s; }
